file: 979_Tai 等 - 2022 - Guaiacol hydrotreating with in-situ generated hydrogen over nimodified zeolite supports.txt

experiments.description: 在300°C水热条件下，使用Ni/沸石催化剂和Zn-H2O氧化还原系统原位产氢，对愈创木酚进行催化加氢脱氧和加氢脱芳反应。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydrotreating of guaiacol was conducted in a 10 mL stainless-steel tubular microreactor... In a typical test, 0.5 g guaiacol, 5 g water, 0.5 g Zn and 0.1 g catalysts were filled in the reactor. The sealed reactor was purged with nitrogen gas to remove air... The reactor was put in a sand bath preheated to 300 °C... The reactions were performed at 300 °C for 1 h with a rotation speed of 130 rpm.

Atmosphere.original: In-situ hydrogen from Zn-H2O redox system

Catalyst stability.value: Decrease in performance after three consecutive runs due to oxidation of Ni active sites, coking, and zinc oxide contamination
Catalyst stability.original: Decrease in performance after three consecutive runs due to oxidation of Ni active sites, coking, and zinc oxide contamination
